trigger_pattern: 429 on bitstream or bundle fetch after light probing
suggested_actions: Lower file probe frequency, separate metadata and file lanes, record reset headers, benchmark again with longer spacing, keep exact ETA visible
decision_boundary: Ask user if best-case ETA still exceeds 48 hours after conservative pacing

trigger_pattern: website count differs from observed or API count
suggested_actions: Compare website claims, API totals, and observed list totals; check hidden filters, closed items, or collection nesting before assuming failure
decision_boundary: Ask user only if discrepancy changes scope or required completeness materially

trigger_pattern: sample files look identical or read like repository notices
suggested_actions: Compare first-page text, PDF metadata, and file size/page count; route notices out of the main corpus
decision_boundary: No user decision needed unless most of the collection is notices

suggested_actions: Use rolling throughput logs, lower frequency or parallelism carefully, estimate viable parallel downloads, then decide whether infrastructure or strategy change is needed
decision_boundary: Ask user before using paid services or aggressive proxy infrastructure

trigger_pattern: access blocked by identity checks, bot filtering, or repeated HTML challenge pages
suggested_actions: Confirm whether API or feed endpoints bypass the block, reduce request rate, consider proxies only as an explicit option set for user review
decision_boundary: Decision pending user for TOR, third-party proxies, or paid anti-bot services
